pg97-p1-s1: You may be aiding in his destruction rather than his recovery.
pg97-p1: You may be aiding in his destruction rather than his recovery.
pg97-p2-s1: Never avoid these responsibilities, but be sure you are doing the right thing if you assume them.
pg97-p2-s2:
Helping others is the
foundation stone of your recovery.
pg97-p2-s3: A kindly act once in a while isn't enough.
pg97-p2-s4:
You have to act the Good Samaritan every
day, if need be.
pg97-p2-s5:
It may mean the loss of many nights' sleep, great interference with your pleasures, interruptions to
your business.
pg97-p2-s6:
It may mean sharing your money and your home, counseling frantic wives and relatives, innumerable trips
to police courts, sanitariums, hospitals, jails and asylums.
pg97-p2-s7: Your telephone may jangle at any time of the day or night.
pg97-p2-s8: Your wife may sometimes say she is neglected.
pg97-p2-s9: A drunk may smash the furniture in your home, or burn a mattress.
pg97-p2-s10:
You may
have to fight with him if he is violent.
pg97-p2-s11:
Sometimes you will have to call a doctor and administer sedatives under his
direction.
pg97-p2-s12: Another time you may have to send for the police or an ambulance.
pg97-p2-s13:
Occasionally you will have to meet such
conditions.
pg97-p2:
Never avoid these responsibilities, but be sure you are doing the right thing if you assume them. Helping others is the
foundation stone of your recovery. A kindly act once in a while isn't enough. You have to act the Good Samaritan every
day, if need be. It may mean the loss of many nights' sleep, great interference with your pleasures, interruptions to
your business. It may mean sharing your money and your home, counseling frantic wives and relatives, innumerable trips
to police courts, sanitariums, hospitals, jails and asylums. Your telephone may jangle at any time of the day or night. Your wife may sometimes say she is neglected. A drunk may smash the furniture in your home, or burn a mattress. You may
have to fight with him if he is violent. Sometimes you will have to call a doctor and administer sedatives under his
direction. Another time you may have to send for the police or an ambulance. Occasionally you will have to meet such
conditions.
pg97-p3-s1: We seldom allow an alcoholic to live in our homes for long at a time.
pg97-p3-s2:
It is not good for him, and it sometimes creates
serious complications in a family.
pg97-p3:
We seldom allow an alcoholic to live in our homes for long at a time. It is not good for him, and it sometimes creates
serious complications in a family.
pg97-p4-s1: Though an alcoholic does not respond, there is no reason why you should neglect his family.
pg97-p4-s2:
You should continue to be
friendly to them.
pg97-p4-s3: The family should be offered your way of life.
pg97-p4-s4:
Should they accept and practice spiritual principles,
there is a much better chance that the head of the family will recover.
pg97-p4-s5:
And even though he continues to drink, the
family will find life more bearable.
pg97-p4:
Though an alcoholic does not respond, there is no reason why you should neglect his family. You should continue to be
friendly to them. The family should be offered your way of life. Should they accept and practice spiritual principles,
there is a much better chance that the head of the family will recover. And even though he continues to drink, the
family will find life more bearable.
